request_payload.exposure_text: As someone who values stability and duty, I worry about the growing calls to reduce our alliance commitments. Did you know that just last year, our partners in the Pacific region reported a 20% increase in security threats? Cutting back now would leave them vulnerable and could embolden adversaries. We've maintained these commitments for decades - consistency is what keeps us safe. #NationalSecurity #AllianceCommitment
